questionHtml: Interpret this value in terms of the context.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

this is the height that the (nose of the) plane approaches (but does not reach)                    A1

OR

this is the maximum possible height of the (nose of the) plane                    A1

OR

the (nose of the) plane does not exceed this height                    A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: Interpret this value in terms of the context.
